name: adminLogBuildActions
description: 1 - log basebuilding actions ( build, dismantle, destroy )

name: adminLogPlacement
description: 1 - log placement action ( traps, tents )

name: adminLogPlayerHitsOnly
description: 1 - log player hits only / 0 - log all hits ( animals/infected )

name: adminLogPlayerList
description: 1 - log periodic player list with position every 5 minutes

name: allowFilePatching
description: if set to 1 it will enable connection of clients with "-filePatching" launch parameter enabled

name: clientPort
description: int value, forces the port the clients connect with

name: defaultObjectViewDistance
description: highest object render distance on server (if higher than "preferredObjectViewDistance=" in DayZ client profile, clientside parameter applies)

name: defaultVisibility
description: highest terrain render distance on server (if higher than "viewDistance=" in DayZ client profile, clientside parameter applies)

name: description
description: Description of the server. Gets displayed to users in the client server browser, max length 255 characters

name: disable3rdPerson
description: Toggles the 3rd person view for players (value 0-1)

name: disableBanlist
description: Disables the usage of ban.txt (default: false)

name: disableBaseDamage
description: set to 1 to disable damage/destruction of fence and watchtower

name: disableContainerDamage
description: set to 1 to disable damage/destruction of tents, barrels, wooden crate and seachest

name: disableCrosshair
description: Toggles the cross-hair (value 0-1)

name: disableMultiAccountMitigation
description: disables multi account mitigation on consoles when true (default: false)

name: disablePersonalLight
description: disables personal light for all clients connected to server

name: disablePrioritylist
description: Disables usage of priority.txt (default: false)

name: disableRespawnDialog
description: set to 1 to disable the respawn dialog (new characters will be spawning as random)

name: disableVoN
description: Enable/disable voice over network (value 0-1)

name: enableDebugMonitor
description: shows info about the character using a debug window in a corner of the screen (value 0-1)

name: enableWhitelist
description: Enable/disable whitelist (value 0-1)

name: forceSameBuild
description: When enabled, the server will allow the connection only to clients with same the .exe revision as the server (value 0-1)

name: guaranteedUpdates
description: Communication protocol used with game server (use only number 1)

name: hostname
description: Server name

name: instanceId
description: DayZ server instance id, to identify the number of instances per box and their storage folders with persistence files

name: lightingConfig
description: 0 for brighter night, 1 for darker night, 2 for Sakhal-specific lighting - if enableCfgGameplayFile is enabled, this option will be overriden by the WorldsData::lightingConfig value

name: logAverageFps
description: Logs the average server FPS (value in seconds), needs to have ''-doLogs'' launch parameter active

name: logFile
description: Saves the server console log to a file in the folder with the other server logs

name: loginQueueConcurrentPlayers
description: The number of players concurrently processed during the login process.

name: loginQueueMaxPlayers
description: The maximum number of players that can wait in login queue

name: logMemory
description: Logs the server memory usage (value in seconds), needs to have the ''-doLogs'' launch parameter active

name: logPlayers
description: Logs the count of currently connected players (value in seconds), needs to have the ''-doLogs'' launch parameter active

name: MaxPing
description: set to define the ping value from which a player is kicked from the server (value in milliseconds)

name: maxPlayers
description: Maximum amount of players

name: motd
description: Message of the day displayed in the in-game chat

name: motdInterval
description: Time interval (in seconds) between each message

name: multithreadedReplication
description: enables multi-threaded processing of server's replication system

name: networkObjectBatchBandwidthLimit
description: The actual limit, could be a [0,1] value or a [1,inf] value depending on networkObjectBatchUseDynamicMaximumBandwidth. See above

name: networkObjectBatchCompute
description: Number of objects in the create/destroy lists that are checked in a single server frame

name: networkObjectBatchEnforceBandwidthLimits
description: Enables a limiter for object creation based on bandwidth statistics

name: networkObjectBatchLogSlow
description: Maximum time a bubble can take to iterate in seconds before it is logged to the console

name: networkObjectBatchSendCreate
description: Maximum number of objects that can be sent for creation

name: networkObjectBatchSendDelete
description: Maximum number of objects that can be sent for deletion

name: networkObjectBatchUseDynamicMaximumBandwidth
description: Determines if the bandwidth limit should be a factor of the maximum bandwidth that can be sent or a hard limit. The maximum bandwidth that can be sent fluctuates depending on demand in the system.

name: networkObjectBatchUseEstimatedBandwidth
description: Switch between the method behind finding the bandwidth usage of a connection. If set to 0, it will use the total of the actual data sent since the last server frame, and if set to 1, it will use a crude estimation

name: networkRangeClose
description: network bubble distance for spawn of close objects with items in them (f.i. backpacks), set in meters, default value if not set is 20

name: networkRangeDistantEffect
description: network bubble distance for spawn of effects (currently only sound effects), set in meters, default value if not set is 4000

name: networkRangeFar
description: network bubble distance for spawn (despawn +10%) of far objects (other than inventory items), set in meters, default value if not set is 1000

name: networkRangeNear
description: network bubble distance for spawn (despawn +10%) of near inventory items objects, set in meters, default value if not set is 150

name: password
description: Password to connect to the server

name: passwordAdmin
description: Password to become a server admin

name: pingCritical
description: set to define the ping value from which the red ping warning is triggered (value in milliseconds)

name: pingWarning
description: set to define the ping value from which the initial yellow ping warning is triggered (value in milliseconds)

name: respawnTime
description: Sets the respawn delay (in seconds) before the player is able to get a new character on the server, when the previous one is dead

name: serverFpsWarning
description: set to define the server fps value under which the initial server fps warning is triggered (minimum value is 11)

name: serverNightTimeAcceleration
description: Accelerated Nigh Time - The numerical value being a multiplier (0.1-64) and also multiplied by serverTimeAcceleration value.

name: serverTime
description: Initial in-game time of the server. "SystemTime" means the local time of the machine.

name: serverTimeAcceleration
description: Accelerated Time - The numerical value being a multiplier (0.1-64).

name: serverTimePersistent
description: Persistent Time (value 0-1) - The actual server time is saved to storage, so when active, the next server start will use the saved time value.

name: shotValidation
description: 1 enables the validation, 0 disables

name: simulatedPlayersBatch
description: Set limit of how much players can be simulated per frame (for server performance gain)

name: speedhackDetection
description: enable speedhack detection, values 1-10 (1 strict, 10 benevolent, can be float)

name: steamQueryPort
description: defines Steam query port, should fix the issue with server not being visible in client server browser

name: storageAutoFix
description: Checks if the persistence files are corrupted and replaces corrupted ones with empty ones (value 0-1)

name: template
description: Mission to load on server startup. <MissionName>.<TerrainName>

name: timeStampFormat
description: Format for timestamps in the .rpt file (value Full/Short)

name: verifySignatures
description: Verifies .pbos against .bisign files. (only 2 is supported)

name: vonCodecQuality
description: Voice over network codec quality, the higher the better (values 0-20)
